Verify that nested @container rules reported with the correct values.
[
    [0] : {
        conditionText : --anchored not anchored(fallback)
        name : --anchored
        queriesAnchored : true
        range : {
            endColumn : 44
            endLine : 1
            startColumn : 11
            startLine : 1
        }
        styleSheetId : <string>
        text : not anchored(fallback)
    }
]
[
    [0] : {
        conditionText : --size-state not (scroll-state(scrollable) and (inline-size > 10000px))
        logicalAxes : Inline
        name : --size-state
        queriesScrollState : true
        range : {
            endColumn : 82
            endLine : 4
            startColumn : 11
            startLine : 4
        }
        styleSheetId : <string>
        text : not (scroll-state(scrollable) and (inline-size > 10000px))
    }
]
